text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text: It's finally time for the autumn Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
Could you please tell us how you feel right now,
before the race?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I could... but before that, may I do a little
performance?

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text: Of course!

She plucks a rose seemingly from thin air, then
covers it with a handkerchief.
Fwoosh

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Now then, where do you think the rose has gone?

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! It's really gone. I don't see it in either of
your hands! Wait...

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text: Huh?! When did it end up in my pocket?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I heard it was your birthday today, so I
wanted to give you a present.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
W-wow, thank you so much! You're in top form
today, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I'd like to think I am. I just have to do what I must.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And what I must do is provide you all with the
most wondrous, heart-stopping entertainment.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, look at her expression! Her vibe is totally
different than usual. I just know we're in for a
treat today!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Everyone in the section over there, take out your
handkerchiefs with Fuji's colors now!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Remember to wave them at chest height! Don't
forget cheering etiquette, and let's have a good
one today!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan A
text_block_list.text: Roger! Aah, I'm so excited!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Perfect. The seed has been planted.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: As for you, Trainer, all you have to do is relax...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: And wait for me to bring back the victory.
choice_data_list: You seem ready for anything today.
You seem ready for anything today.

text_block_list.text:
When I say that, her collected expression cracks
just a little.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Good.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to you and Mother, I finally know what I
have to do.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Trainer. I'm all right now. I'll be sure
to give everyone a great time.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
After all, I'm your evening star, sparkling in the
night sky.
